sections.paragraph:
fem.-

(1) a wall, a fence, round about, Ringmauer, i.q. טוּר No. 1, from the root טוּר to surround.

(2) a place fenced off by a wall or hedge; hence-(a) a fortress, Son 8:9 an enclosure, a country village, an encampment of Nomadic tribes, Gen 25:16 Num 31:10 1Ch 6:39 Psa 69:26 Eze 25:4.
